name: acdc
description: Resume or continue a local Claude Code session from Codex. Reads the prior Claude transcript and current repo state, then hands off a structured summary so Codex takes over where Claude left off. Also includes recall-session and recall-context skills for self-recall over past sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Resume Claude Code sessions inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Resume or continue a local Claude Code session from Codex. Reads the Claude transcript, cross-checks current repo state, and produces a structured handoff — by session name or id.
defaultPrompt: Resume a Claude Code session by name or id.
Continue my Claude Code work in Codex.
